title: Add API error translation layer
objective: Build translateApiError(code, params) so the UI translates from error.code/params client-side instead of preferring server-supplied message, falling back to message only for unmapped codes.

include: Add src/i18n/translateApiError.ts consuming the errors namespace with interpolation.
Update noiseCutApi.ts readErrorMessage to surface {code, params}.
Remove getKnownApiErrorMessage from App.tsx in favor of the shared helper.
Table-driven test over every known error code x both locales, plus one unmapped-code fallback test.
exclude: Any change to the noise-cut-api contract or repo.
New error-handling UI beyond swapping the message source.
Formatting, switcher, pluralization, or test migration work.

done: translateApiError exists and is used everywhere an API error is displayed.
Table-driven test covers every known error code x both locales.
Confirmed noise-cut-api Slice 010 (ApiError.Params) has shipped before this task began implementation.
